author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Deduplicate runtime terminal-status checks across query commands

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: multiple commands locally normalize status with normalizeStatusInput and then check statusRegistry.terminal_statuses. Representative copies include list.ts:80 isTerminal, search.ts:202 isTerminal, context.ts:328 normalizeStatusForRegistry and context.ts:348 isTerminal, close.ts:40, and dedupe-audit.ts:146. Existing status-normalization items are closed, and open pm-v798 is item-type normalization rather than runtime status registry helper reuse.

Shared runtime status helpers normalize configured statuses and test terminal membership; list/search/context/close/dedupe-audit use those helpers; custom status registry behavior remains covered; focused status/list/search tests and pnpm build pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'terminal status statusRegistry terminal_statuses isTerminal normalizeStatusInput' found closed historical status items and no active exact dedup item.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for terminal status helpers

value.author: terminal-status-dedup
value.text: DONE (terminal-status-dedup): Extracted two shared runtime status helpers into src/core/item/status.ts: normalizeStatusForRegistry(status, registry) = normalizeStatusInput(status, registry) ?? status, and isTerminalStatus(status, registry) = registry.terminal_statuses.has(normalizeStatusForRegistry(status, registry)). These preserve the exact prior semantics (registry-aware normalization with raw-value fallback). Replaced the duplicated local isTerminal/normalizeStatusForRegistry blocks in 5 command files: list.ts (removed local isTerminal, 3 call sites -> isTerminalStatus), search.ts (removed local isTerminal, 2 call sites; dropped now-unused normalizeStatusInput import), close.ts (removed local isTerminal, 2 call sites; dropped now-unused ItemStatus import), context.ts (removed local normalizeStatusForRegistry + isTerminal, now imported from status.ts; 1 isTerminal call site -> isTerminalStatus), dedupe-audit.ts (local isTerminal now delegates to isTerminalStatus when dedupeStatusRegistry is set, preserving the module-state default-set fallback for the unreachable null path). status.ts is already in vitest.config.ts include (100% gated) so NO new include line is required. Extended tests/unit/status-normalization.spec.ts with describe blocks for normalizeStatusForRegistry (known/alias/raw-fallback) and isTerminalStatus (built-in terminal closed+canceled, non-terminal open+in_progress, custom registry terminal+alias+non-terminal, raw-fallback for unknown/blank) using resolveRuntimeStatusRegistry over SETTINGS_DEFAULTS.schema and a custom schema. tsc --noEmit: exit 0. Focused tests: 6 spec files (status-normalization, list/search/context/close/dedupe-audit command specs) all pass = 96 tests. Coordinator: CHANGELOG ### Changed bullet -> 'Extract shared isTerminalStatus/normalizeStatusForRegistry helpers to src/core/item/status.ts; deduplicate runtime terminal-status checks across list/search/context/close/dedupe-audit commands (pm-i04b)'.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: COORDINATOR VERIFIED 2026-05-24: combined full coverage gate green (1621 tests, 100%), static-quality-gate passed (clones gone), typecheck clean. Dogfooded list/search/context/close terminal-status flows in temp repo — all correct.
